message:
test(snapshots): regenerate a11y snapshot baselines with pinned themes

Update all accessibility mode snapshot baselines to reflect the new
deterministic theme pinning in tests.

The a11y snapshot tests now use ScopedThemeLock to ensure consistent
theme state during rendering. This causes some snapshots to show
different theme names in the status bar (e.g., "Cyberpunk Aurora" or
"Darcula" depending on what the test explicitly pins).

Affected test categories:
- a11y_all_modes_*: Combined high contrast + large text + reduced motion
- a11y_high_contrast_*: High contrast mode across various screens
- a11y_large_text_*: Large text mode with scaled fonts
- a11y_reduced_motion_*: Reduced motion with disabled animations
- a11y_panel_*: A11y settings panel visibility tests
- a11y_dashboard_screen_*: Dashboard with individual a11y modes

All 65 a11y snapshot tests now pass consistently in parallel execution.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
